creator: ports.maintainer@evilphi.com
text:
Update sysutils/3dm port to 3dm2 v2.09.01.004 from code-set 9.5.3.

This version still uses a static-linked 5.4 binary and thus requires KSE support for static-linked binaries.  The port defines BROKEN for OSVERSION >= 800000 due to the deprecation of KSE in 8.x.  LSI/3ware is aware of this problem.  The FreeBSD version of code-set 10.0 should include an 8.x-compatible 3dm2.  There is no firm release date for 10.0 on FreeBSD.

Fix: n/a

Patch attached with submission follows:
How-To-Repeat: n/a
